zh.Aldingham, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆
zh.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾彤絲朵

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Harington於大約1369年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德時，她的父親Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton28歲，母親Isabel English20歲。她於1382年與Sir Thomas Tunstall在英國英格蘭藍卡爾彤絲朵結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1407年6月8日之前在英國英格蘭藍卡爾彤絲朵，埋葬在英國藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆。

zh-hans.Aldingham, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆
zh-hans.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾彤絲朵
zh-hans.Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Harington于大约1369年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton28岁，母亲Isabel English20岁。她于1382年与Sir Thomas Tunstall在英国英格兰藍卡爾彤絲朵结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1407年6月8日之前在英国英格兰藍卡爾彤絲朵，埋葬在英国藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Harington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Harrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Harington was born about 1369, in Westmorland, England, her father, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, was 28 and her mother, Isabel English, was 20. She married Sir Thomas Tunstall in 1382, in Tunstall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died before 8 June 1407, in Tunstall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Aldingham, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Harington est née environ 1369, à Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabel English, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Tunstall en 1382, à Tunstall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée avant 8 juin 1407, à Tunstall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Aldingham, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Harington um 1369 in Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton 28 und ihre Mutter Isabel English 20. Sie hat 1382 in Tunstall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Tunstall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb vor 8. Juni 1407 in Tunstall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Aldingham, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Harington è nata il circa 1369 nel Westmorland, England, sua padre, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Isabel English, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Tunstall nel 1382, nel Tunstall, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì prima del 8 giugno 1407, nel Tunstall, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Aldingham, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Haringtonが約1369年にイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Harington of Farletonは28歳，母Isabel Englishは20歳であった。1382年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアトゥンスタルでSir Thomas Tunstallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1407年6月8日以前にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアトゥンスタルで死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアアルディンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Harington(이)가 대략 1369년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel English(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1382년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 툰스탤에서 Sir Thomas Tunstall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1407년 6월 8일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 툰스탤에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 알딩함에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1369–before 8 June 1407: ойролцоогоор 1369 он–1407 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 8–наас өмнө
mn.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: Tunstall, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Harington nasceu aproximadamente 1369, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabel English, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Tunstall em 1382, em Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 8 de junho de 1407, em Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Aldingham, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Harington родилась около 1369 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel English, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Tunstall в 1382 г. в местности тунсталл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла перед 8 июнь 1407 г. в местности тунсталл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности алдингхам, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Harington nació aproximadamente 1369, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Isabel English, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Tunstall en 1382, en Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió antes de 8 de junio de 1407, en Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Aldingham, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
